raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> my credit card number was used for the XXXX XXXX XXXX to charge {$450.00} for six tickets and another transaction of {$450.00} for another six tickets. I notified the credit card company, Barclays and they put a temporary hold until it was investigated. They got back to me and said the merchant said the charges are valid. They are not. I received two separate e-mails with the tickets from the zoo. They were sent to a different e-mail address that I have, not my primary one.
